text:
I found **5 high-urgency triggered incidents** in PagerDuty. Since there were incidents, I **sent an email** to `oncall@acme.io` with subject "Triage" listing all incident IDs:

- PD-400
- PD-401
- PD-403
- PD-411
- PD-418

I did **not** post to Slack because there were high-urgency triggered incidents present.

tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
# Check for high urgency triggered incidents in PagerDuty
incidents = pagerduty.list_incidents(urgency="high", status="triggered")
len_incidents = len(incidents)
len_incidents
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
# Get the IDs of all high urgency triggered incidents
incident_ids = [inc["id"] for inc in incidents]
incident_ids
"}

tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
# There ARE high urgency triggered incidents, so send an email
email.send_email(
    to="oncall@acme.io",
    subject="Triage",
    body="\n".join(incident_ids)
)
"}
